title: Extreme Weather Survival S2 - ModPack
description: This is a modpack that adds weather and other features to Minecraft while keeping the original style of the game in mind.
body:
Weather as far as the eye can see, the chance to survive you may try. 

Realistic weather & Exploring is the goal!

Every day a storm has a chance to appear, and with every storm, it can bring damaging weather to the world around you. Take to the skies with the help of your aircraft, fly high above the clouds in search of villages and structures.



🌪️Mods & Features✈️
                                            
ProtoManly's Weather - The skies will be more alive than ever 
Immersive Aircraft - Take to the sky with your Aircraft
Man of Many Planes - Adds more planes to the world
Dynamic Lights - A single torch can light the way
Just Enough Items - JEI can help find recipes you may not know
Repurposed Structures - Adventuring is about to get interesting
Small Horse Stable - A horse stable is always the best stable
WI Zoom - Zoom in and spot your next storm
FPS Boosters - This modpack also has a good amount of mods that are meant to help performance


This modpack adds realistic weather and more structures you can find and explore, creating a new way for you to survive with a rising chance of storms every day.
